title: Decken Threatens Shirahoshi Again
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones. The core beat is decken threatens shirahoshi again.
scene: The scene follows decken threatens shirahoshi again, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is Robin coming out of the forest?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AHAH... I'm not sure what's going on exactly ....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're all on the same side here, yes? We shouldn't be fighting amongst ourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: think about what you are doing, Luffy....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you and your friends start rampaging across fish-man Island, what will the result be...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sometimes the moment

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: every time our race has attempted to make peace with the humans...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ....it has always been humans who have stood in our way.

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: "Humans are a violent and dangerous race!"...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: "Humans look down on fishmen and detest them!"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the reality that our people have learned...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...from the cruel path that history has taken up until now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Even in the case of Arlong... many of our people still believe that he was hunted down by humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surely for the crime of being a fish-man!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: If you, the very humans responsible for Arlong's defeat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...were to stand against hordy now as well, what would they think?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if your actions did succeed in saving fish-man Island from this crisis...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Seeing hordy's attempts to stand against the humans merclessly crushed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would only serve to reinforce their doubts and fears about human- kind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The people would see in you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...the shadow of that dark history....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get what you're trying to say, JIMBE! ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but it's only natural for us to save our own captured comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we sit here and do nothing, fish-man Island will fall completely into hordy's grasp.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are plenty of people on that island who we call friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, Hachi ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seem pretty determined not to tell us how you got so beat up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But you said something earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: You said hordy isn't afraid to victimise his fellow fishmen if they show sympathy towards humans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Did hordy's lot give you those wounds ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...because you tried to stand up for us...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hachi ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hacchin, is that true?! Did hordy and his cronies do this to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could I face him in the knowledge ...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...that Arlong's will still lives on?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nyluuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JIMBE!! I know this island is your home ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I think that's one of the reasons Luffy has to act right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't just ignore what's going on here ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have more than enough reason to fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because this is Caimie- Chan's Home!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and Shira- Hoshi-chan's home! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the glorious mermaid Paradise of my dreams!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You heard him - move it, jimbe!!! I've said I'm going, and I mean it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will not allow it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Leave this to me!!!

summary: Decken Threatens Shirahoshi Again. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
